title: Roasted Creamy Indian Lentils Dal
description: A peppery, creamy dal made with roasted lentils and coconut milk, perfect for a date-night dinner.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat and toast cumin seeds until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add diced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger; sauté until onion turns translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in red lentils, tomatoes, coriander powder, chili powder, garam masala, and salt; cook for 2 minutes to combine flavors.
Pour in four cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
After the lentils soften, add coconut milk, pepper, and lemon juice; stir well and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra salt, pepper, or chili if desired.
Remove the pot from heat and fluff the dal with a wooden spoon.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a drizzle of extra coconut milk before serving.
Serve hot with a side of grilled paneer or grilled vegetables for a complete date-night meal.
